sample_size.description: Total number of 16- and 17-year-old children surveyed in the Portland, Maine, Bayside East Housing Project.

children_out_of_school.description: Number of children found to be out of school among those surveyed.

reported_percentage.description: The percentage (25%) reported by CDF as the proportion of 16- and 17-year-olds out of school, critiqued in the answer as misleading due to the small sample size.
